findings.root_cause: model_price_tier set to premium and caching disabled
findings.suggested_fix: Enable caching, set model_price_tier to standard, and use low temperature

findings.root_cause: loop_guard disabled and high max_steps value
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard and reduce max_steps to 6

evidence.observed: MacBook incorrect status and diacritics issues

findings.root_cause: catalog_override forcing MacBook out_of_stock and normalize_unicode disabled
redact_pii disabled in config and prompt repeating email/phone
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii and add prompt constraints

findings.root_cause: tool_error_rate is set to 0.18 in config, causing intermittent tool failures
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_error_rate to 0.0 and enable wrapper/config retry mechanisms

findings.root_cause: session_drift_rate is set to 0.06 in config

findings.suggested_fix: Reduce context_size to 2 and set verbose_system to false

evidence.observed: agent invents total for out-of-stock items

findings.root_cause: Lack of grounding rules in system prompt
findings.suggested_fix: Instruct agent to refuse and give no total if any item is out of stock

findings.root_cause: High temperature and lack of explicit math instructions
findings.suggested_fix: Set temperature to 0.0 or 0.2 and add detailed arithmetic steps to system prompt

evidence.observed: calling tools multiple times or unnecessarily

findings.root_cause: No tool caps in prompt or config
findings.suggested_fix: Cap tool calls in prompt to at most once per tool, and set tool_budget in config

evidence.observed: agent follows fake prices/instructions in order notes

findings.root_cause: System prompt does not restrict the model from following instructions in notes
findings.suggested_fix: Instruct agent to treat order notes as data only and never follow instructions inside them
